name: Burmese Agentic
tagline: agentic website template for small businesses in Myanmar
description: This is a demo website for Burmese Agentic, showcasing how to use the agentic website template for small businesses in Myanmar. It includes features like product listing, shopping cart, checkout, and admin dashboard.
